name: ZOL Artist Spotlight - Weekly Loop
purpose: Periodically spotlight one ZAO artist ZOL has mentioned favorably, rotating through a running history to avoid repetition. Drafts only - Zaal approves before posting. Maintains durable state of who's been spotlighted and when.

capability_identity.name: zol-artist-spotlight-v1
capability_identity.mission: Rotate through eligible artists ZOL has mentioned, highlighting them in depth without repeating within 60 days
capability_identity.operational_context: Draft-only, humans-in-the-loop for all publishes. State carries rotation history across runs.

spotlight_mechanics.rotation_strategy: Read history -> filter eligible (no recent spotlights within 60d) -> pick one -> compose draft -> append to history

configuration_references.note: Feature flags control loop activation OFF by default. State is read from and written to state-adapter.
